10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Split Jerk
strength.description:
2x2 | *Legs Long
* Pause in catch if you can
* Punch the ceiling | 24min
BUILD 5 Sets E3MOM
00:00 3 @ 50%
03:00 3 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 2 @ 85-90%
HOLD 2 Sets E4MOM
16:00 2 @ 95%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 Rounds - 3 mins work / 1 min rest
20/18 Cal Row/Ski
8 Burpee Box Overs
10 C2B
Max C&J in time remaining @61/43
Scale cals to finish within 1 min.
Scale reps to finish BBJO/C2B in 90 seconds.
Pick a weight you can cycle (but try to stick with quick singles)
Score clean & jerks

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain and upper back to balance heavy lower body and pressing; minimal CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 4 at 70 percent. Metcon: Workout: 20/18 Cal Row/Ski, 8 Burpee Box Overs, 10 C2B, Pick a weight you can cycle (but try to stick with quick singles). For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
